abilities.name: Gentle Presence
abilities.description: When you use the Mend skill on an ally — Tamer or Digimon — add your Love rank as a flat bonus to the result on top of the normal skill formula.

abilities.name: Leomon's Lesson
abilities.description: Once per encounter when your Digimon is at 25% HP or below they may use their Move Action as a Free Action this round.

abilities.name: Hold On
abilities.requirements: At least 1 Row 1 ability, Love rank 4
abilities.description: Once per encounter when your Digimon would trigger the cascade at Default Stage, you may spend 6 Hope to have them stabilise at 1 HP instead. Default Stage does not drop.

abilities.name: Puppet Show
abilities.requirements: At least 1 Row 1 ability, Love rank 4
abilities.description: Once per encounter as a Free Action, you may use your puppet to distract one enemy within 4 spaces. That enemy takes -2 to their next attack roll.

abilities.name: Grief and Light
abilities.description: Once per session at the start of your turn you may spend 5 Hope. All allied Digimon immediately restore HP equal to your Love rank x 2. This does not cost your Basic Action.

abilities.name: What Leomon Taught Me
abilities.description: When your Digimon is at 50% HP or below they may use moves they know from one stage higher than their current stage. Stage lock rules are suspended for your Digimon only while this condition is active.

abilities.name: Still Here
abilities.description: Once per session when your partner Digimon is reduced to 0 HP, you may immediately activate Still Here. The cascade resolves normally — but before it does, restore HP to your Digimon equal to your Love rank. Then immediately take a bonus turn outside of normal turn order. This bonus turn does not count toward your turn in the current round.
